news.title: The biggest release of emergency oil stockpiles in history was announced. Why crude may keep rising
news.summary: Oil prices have surged more than 17% since the International Energy Agency announced the largest release of crude stockpiles in its 50-year history.

news.title: Trump says U.S. 'obliterated' military targets on Iran's Kharg Island but didn't 'wipe out' oil infrastructure
news.summary: President Trump said he directed U.S. Central Command to execute a bombing raid on Kharg Island. He said the raid "obliterated" military targets on the island.

news.title: Berkshire Hathaway filing provides glimpse of share buyback resumption
news.summary: Berkshire Hathaway filed its definitive proxy statement with the SEC late this afternoon. The company's annual shareholders meeting will take place on May 2 in Omaha.

news.title: As New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani faces $7 billion budget hole, free parking may be history
news.summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is facing a $7 billion budget hole. The free parking NYC residents have taken for granted may be a revenue opportunity.

news.title: A Paramount-Warner Bros. movie slate could rule the 2027 box office, but is it sustainable?
news.summary: Paramount CEO David Ellison has said he wants to make 30 movies a year. He has franchises like Godzilla-Kong, Superman and Sonic the Hedgehog to lean on.

news.title: ‘I’m experiencing issues with arthritis’: I’m 68 with $3 million saved. Why am I not ready for a life of leisure?
news.summary: “I can draw $4,300 a month in Social Security if I retire this summer,” he says. “I’ll be able to retire in the summer.”

news.title: These parents retired in their 30s and 40s while raising young kids. Here’s how they pulled off the impossible.
news.summary: A new generation of money-minded parents is urging young people who want to start families to map a path to early financial independence so they can prioritize their families.

news.title: ‘I have no savings’: I’m inheriting $400,000. I’m 64 with $900 in Social Security. What should I do?
news.summary: “I have no experience with any life other than paycheck to paycheck,” he says. “I’ve never been in a position of power. I’m not a politician.”

news.title: These 4 cybersecurity stocks are Wall Street’s favorite AI-proof plays
news.summary: Cybersecurity platforms are emerging as essential infrastructure needed to channel rising traffic from AI agents. While the broader software sector stumbles, cybersecurity platforms are becoming essential infrastructure.

news.title: Here are the ways private-credit pain could hurt your portfolio
news.summary: Big banks are increasingly seeing their shares impacted by worries about underwriting quality at private lenders. Big banks are seeing their share prices impacted by concerns about private lenders' underwriting.
